competitors.name: CodePorting AI
competitors.keyDifference: Generic AI translator without AST parsing; Pwsh2CSharp combines AST structural accuracy with AI cleanup for more reliable output
competitors.notes: Supports bulk file conversion. Handles invalid/incomplete source. Measures in tokens. Accepts crypto payments.

competitors.name: CodeConversion (Ironman Software)
competitors.keyDifference: Basic AST translation without AI cleanup passes; misses complex patterns that Pwsh2CSharp's AI refinement handles
competitors.notes: Install-Module CodeConversion. Bidirectional (also C# to PowerShell). Intent-based pattern conversion.

competitors.name: General AI Code Converters (ChatGPT/Claude/Copilot)
competitors.keyDifference: No AST parsing, inconsistent for large codebases, no batch processing or cross-file consistency
competitors.notes: Interactive refinement but no structured pipeline. Cannot maintain project-level coherence.

competitors.name: Manual Conversion
competitors.keyDifference: Highest accuracy but slowest and most expensive; Pwsh2CSharp automates 80-90% of conversion work
competitors.notes: Traditional approach requiring deep knowledge of both languages. Unit test validation still needed.
